entry.title: his crown, his sword
entry.summary:
Author: stzryy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,099Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Bruce Wayne has been crowned King of Gotham, but is bound to do nothing by his council. Clark Kent has finally been knighted, and soon becomes the personal guard to the princess. Kara Zor-El sits in her palace, wondering what she will do next that upsets her royal parents. When the King of Gotham is pushed to find a Queen, they soon come to realize there is more at stake than just reputation—but their kingdoms as well.

entry.title: Conjunction
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,818Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 15

Summary: The ring is on his finger. Bruce has been aware of this for forty-seven hours.He keeps looking at it. He is not performing anything about this. He is simply — looking at it. Clark has told Perry, Lois, Martha, and Diana Prince.Bruce has told zero people. This is, he acknowledges, a disparity. — Book Three of the Aphelion trilogy. Bruce doesn't know how not to be a bachelor. Clark is going to teach him. The chair gets moved. The furniture negotiation is ongoing. Clark hums country songs. Clark talks to the monstera plants. Martha has thoughts about the wedding. Alfred has already prepared. The orbit continues. Warmer now. And known.

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 115,811Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 589

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: All The Things We Cannot See
entry.summary:
Author: Ivasa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,833Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 84

Summary: People disappear in Gotham every day. Batman finds them. That’s the job. But information has a price, and sometimes it requires becoming someone else entirely. A different face, a different name, a different life - Bruce is good at it. To him, wearing a disguise is almost easier than being himself. This case should have been simple. It stops being simple the moment a rookie reporter from Metropolis decides that Matches Malone is exactly the kind of source he’s been looking for.

entry.title: Spiders and Bats Come From the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: Zoveezz

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,073Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 433

Summary: Two years after being erased by the spell, twenty-one-year-old Peter Parker is pulled out of nowhere into another universe, Gotham. Now he has to find a way back to his own, no matter the cost. After a while, he thinks that maybe with the help of these bats he can get back home. ¿Why does he keep feeling like he's already there? ¿And why does Jason keep showing up at his mechanic job on his broken motorcycle?   ------- At twenty, Jason became Red Hood; now, at twenty-two, he still is. He no longer gets along badly with his stupid vigilante family, but he's not comfortable neither. Maybe because that feeling of loneliness, of isolation, is always there, with the rage. He's stressed out with a difficult case when he meets Peter, whom, for some reason, Jason can't stop staring at. And then there was that idiot Spider-Man who was hanging around in his neighborhood.

entry.title: Who Wins?
entry.summary:
Author: DeariemeDearemy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,262Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: There is something lingering over Gotham city. Maybe it's the disappearance of her beloved hero after a video released of him acting with extreme violence, ultimately resulting in him killing a man. Maybe it's her beloved Prince, only now returning after a year of absence in mourning his missing son. Maybe Gotham city is just like that, permeates through her, affecting the soul of each of her people. Maybe she is just a sick city. Maybe there is more to the story. Lois and Clark don't know. But they intend to find out.

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,925Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 40

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

entry.title: Gods Don't Belong in Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 133,540Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 1,325

Summary: “Well?” he asked, his voice low.A pause.His eyes dragged over Clark, not with drunken lust but with something sharper.“You here to watch… or join? Might as well make it a threesome.”Clark choked on his own spit so hard he nearly doubled over, coughing. It's been 5 years since both Superman and Batman began their separate crusades. Both curious but cautious.Clark remains in Metropolis, respecting the Dark Knight's strict rule to keep metas out of Gotham. Meanwhile, Bruce is consumed with finding a balance between Batman and Bruce Wayne, determine to not repeat mistakes of the past. But it's hard to do that when he is too stubborn to accept help. Fortunately, for him Clark is just as stubborn.Their paths cross when Clark is sent to cover a gala in Gotham, stepping into the city he's barred from. What begins as a professional obligation turns into an unforgettable collision with Gotham's once reclusive billionaire. Or Clark and Bruce fall for each other slowly yet quickly.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Maybe Someone, Somewhere Else
entry.summary:
Author: Brenda

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,719Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 294

Summary: They both knew the unspoken rule. Knew that breaking it would bring an end to a partnership that had sustained them for almost a decade, the balance so delicate that a whisper would ruin it. And here Clark was, practically shouting it from the rooftops. Bruce couldn't allow that to happen. (Or: When a Superman from another universe lands on the Watchtower, the fallout pushes Bruce and Clark to deal with years of unsaid feelings.)

entry.title: But you can't take the circus from the boy
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,094Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 217

Summary: Damian Wayne has everything he's ever wanted. A beautiful husband. A precious child. A title of his own. Even his siblings, having experienced horrors beyond their years, are growing as people alongside him. But with everything in his life moving so smoothly, he can't help but wonder when the other shoe will drop. Happiness isn't something that comes easily to Demons, after all.

entry.title: Who baby trap who?
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,243Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 252

Summary: “Bruce baby-trapped Clark.” Dick turned to the figure on the couch: Jason was staring at the photographs on the wall with a strange look, not exactly angry, but as if he'd just had an epiphany that had previously been denied him. It was because of that expression that Dick chose not to grab his escrima sticks and electrocute him. “What?” he asked, approaching the couch. Jason gestured towards the photos, his gaze feverish”Yeah, he baby trapped him! With you!” Dick really had no idea where that came from, and he really didn't want to know what was going through the mind of a painkiller addict. He just said,” Now it's not what happened…also, it's not biologically possible.”

entry.title: be the crack that let's the light in.
entry.summary:
Author: philmphobia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,917Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 160

Summary: Bruce Wayne finding himself at the front and centre of a public scandal is nothing new. Falling from a building and being scooped up by The Batman like a damsel in distress, however, is very new. To help cope with the never-ending demands for information on the ever illusive Batman, Bruce hires quiet, calm, unsuspecting reporter Clark Kent to help set the record straight. How was Bruce to know his plan would backfire so spectacularly?

entry.title: I thought it was a bird, but it was just a paper bag.
entry.summary:
Author: Schadenfreudeeee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,484Chapters: 1/40Kudos: 6

Summary: Bruce Wayne is hosting a gala for the first time in his life, and Clark Kent would rather be anywhere else.
